nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Myzomela
nodes.summary: Myzomela（Myzomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联41种鸟类，如Drab myzomela、White-chinned myzomela、Ruby-throated myzomela等41种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Drab myzomela
nodes.summary: The drab myzomela or Seram myzomela (Myzomela blasii) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to the islands of Seram, Boano and Ambon in Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
